title: RingCentral + Monday CRM

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! My team is developing a custom solution to integrate phone systems like RingCentral, OpenPhone, Dialpad, and others into Monday CRM. For example, when a new call is logged in the phone system, our app will search within monday.com for a deal, lead, contact, account, (configured by user) with a matching phone number, and log the call info into the Emails & Activities timeline as a Call Summary. You can join the waitlist here and we’ll reach out to you when the solution is ready!
